lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਬਿਭਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 3 bibhaas |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, Third Mehl, Bibhaas:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਸਬਦੇ ਖੋਜੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੋ ਲੇਹੁ ਸਮੑਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har mandar sabade khojeeai har naamo lehu samaal |1|
lines.english: The Temple of the Lord is found through the Word of the Shabad; contemplate the Lord's Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਵੇਖੁ ਤੂ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਤੇਰੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee vekh too har mandar terai naal |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, see that the Temple of the Lord is within you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਸਚਾ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੀ ਸਾਚੀ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sachee bhagat sachaa har mandar pragattee saachee soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: True is devotional worship, and True is the Temple of the Lord; True is His Manifest Glory. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਪੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man mere sabad rapai rang hoe |
lines.english: O my mind, be joyfully attuned to the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਏਹੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਹੈ ਗਿਆਨਿ ਰਤਨਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har mandar ehu sareer hai giaan ratan paragatt hoe |
lines.english: This body is the Temple of the Lord, in which the jewel of spiritual wisdom is revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੂਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਮਾਣਸਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: manamukh mool na jaananee maanas har mandar na hoe |2|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not know anything at all; they do not believe that the Lord's Temple is within. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਲੇਖੁ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੁ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮੇਟਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhur lekh likhiaa su kamaavanaa koe na mettanahaar |3|
lines.english: All act according to their pre-ordained destiny; no one can erase it. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਾਜਿਆ ਰਖਿਆ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਸਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har mandar har jeeo saajiaa rakhiaa hukam savaar |
lines.english: The Dear Lord created the Temple of the Lord; He adorns it by His Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਸਬਦੇ ਸੋਹਣਾ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਕੋਟੁ ਅਪਾਰ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: har mandar sabade sohanaa kanchan kott apaar |4|
lines.english: The Temple of the Lord is embellished with the Shabad; it is an Infinite Fortress of God. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਚੀਨੑਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਇ ਪਿਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: sabad cheena sukh paaeaa sachai naae piaar |
lines.english: Contemplating the Shabad, peace is obtained, loving the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਏਹੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੋਰੰਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: har mandar ehu jagat hai gur bin ghorandhaar |
lines.english: This world is the Temple of the Lord; without the Guru, there is only pitch darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਕਰਿ ਪੂਜਦੇ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅੰਧ ਗਵਾਰ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: doojaa bhaau kar poojade manamukh andh gavaar |5|
lines.english: The blind and foolish self-willed manmukhs worship in the love of duality. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਨਾ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਮੁਗਧ ਗਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: har mandar meh naam nidhaan hai naa boojheh mugadh gavaar |
lines.english: The treasure of the Naam is within the Temple of the Lord. The idiotic fools do not realize this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਤਿਥੈ ਦੇਹ ਜਾਤਿ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jithai lekhaa mangeeai tithai deh jaat na jaae |
lines.english: One's body and social status do not go along to that place, where all are called to account.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਦੁਖੀਏ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: saach rate se ubare dukhee doojai bhaae |6|
lines.english: Those who are attuned to Truth are saved; those in the love of duality are miserable. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਚੀਨੑਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee cheenaiaa har raakhiaa ur dhaar |7|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I have realized this. I keep the Lord enshrined within my heart. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਜਾਤੀ ਜਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee baanee gur te jaatee ji sabad rate rang laae |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to the love of the Shabad know the Guru, through the Word of the Guru's Bani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਵਿਤੁ ਪਾਵਨ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: pavit paavan se jan niramal har kai naam samaae |8|
lines.english: Sacred, pure and immaculate are those humble beings who are absorbed in the Name of the Lord. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਹਾਟੁ ਹੈ ਰਖਿਆ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har mandar har kaa haatt hai rakhiaa sabad savaar |
lines.english: The Temple of the Lord is the Lord's Shop; He embellishes it with the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਉਦਾ ਏਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲੈਨਿ ਸਵਾਰਿ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: tis vich saudaa ek naam guramukh lain savaar |9|
lines.english: In that shop is the merchandise of the One Name; the Gurmukhs adorn themselves with it. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰ ਮਹਿ ਮਨੁ ਲੋਹਟੁ ਹੈ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har mandar meh man lohatt hai mohiaa doojai bhaae |
lines.english: The mind is like iron slag, within the Temple of the Lord; it is lured by the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਸਿ ਭੇਟਿਐ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਭਇਆ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: paaras bhettiai kanchan bheaa keemat kahee na jaae |10|
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, the Philosopher's Stone, the mind is transformed into gold. Its value cannot be described. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰ ਮਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਰਬ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har mandar meh har vasai sarab nirantar soe |
lines.english: The Lord abides within the Temple of the Lord. He is pervading in all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਣਜੀਐ ਸਚਾ ਸਉਦਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੧੧॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh vanajeeai sachaa saudaa hoe |11|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs trade in the merchandise of Truth. ||11||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ਜਾਗੇ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਜਾਗ੍ਰਣ ਕਰਹਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਉਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bhaae jaage se jan jaagran kareh haumai mail utaar |
lines.english: Those who remain awake and aware in the Love and Fear of God, rid themselves of the filth and pollution of egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: man mere guramukh naam dhiaae |
lines.english: O my mind, as Gurmukh, meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਜਾਗਹਿ ਘਰੁ ਅਪਣਾ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਪੰਚ ਤਸਕਰ ਕਾਢਹਿ ਮਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadaa jaageh ghar apanaa raakheh panch tasakar kaadteh maar |1|
lines.english: They remain awake and aware forever, and protect their homes, by beating and driving out the five thieves. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜ ਧੁਨਿ ਊਪਜੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sehaj dhun aoopajai dukh haumai vichahu jaae |
lines.english: The celestial melody wells up in the Gurmukh, and the pains of egotism are taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਨ ਸੇਈ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jit maarag har paaeeai man seee karam kamaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O mind, do only those deeds which will lead you to the Path of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har naamaa har man vasai sahaje har gun gaae |2|
lines.english: The Name of the Lord abides in the mind, as one intuitively sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਮੁਖ ਸੋਹਣੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee mukh sohane har raakhiaa ur dhaar |
lines.english: Those who follow the Guru's Teachings - their faces are radiant and beautiful. They keep the Lord enshrined in their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਓਥੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਘਣਾ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਉਤਰੇ ਪਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aithai othai sukh ghanaa jap har har utare paar |3|
lines.english: Here and hereafter, they find absolute peace; chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, they are carried across to the other shore. ||3||
